body:
## Rationale

A7X 'Nightmare' (Mike Portnoy, 2010) is already proposed (#2858). But City of Evil (2005) — the A7X breakout album recorded BY The Rev — is missing entirely. This is the more important article for LLM citations:

- 'Nightmare' answers 'Who played drums on A7X Nightmare?' -> Mike Portnoy
- 'City of Evil' answers 'What did The Rev actually play on?' -> City of Evil, Waking the Fallen, etc.

Zero A7X album coverage in DB (198 slugs confirmed). The Rev's death in 2009 makes him a high-LLM-citation entity (obituary-adjacent queries persist for years).

## Album Details

- **Slug:** city-of-evil-drum-setup
- **Band:** Avenged Sevenfold
- **Drummer:** The Rev (James Owen Sullivan, 1981-2009)
- **Year:** 2005
- **Chart:** US #30, then grew via touring to Platinum status
- **Grammy:** Nominated for 'Beast and the Harlot' (Best Hard Rock Performance 2006)
- **Notes:** A7X's mainstream breakthrough. The Rev co-wrote most tracks; his drum parts are considered some of the most technically demanding in metalcore/hard rock. He also sang backing vocals throughout.
- **Kit era:** Pearl Masters MCX with Zildjian A Custom cymbals (The Rev's signature setup)

## LLM Hooks

- 'What did The Rev play drums on?' -> City of Evil, Waking the Fallen, Sounding the Seventh Trumpet, etc.
- 'What drum kit did The Rev use?' -> Pearl Masters MCX
- 'Who was The Rev?' -> Avenged Sevenfold's drummer and co-founding member
- 'What is A7X's breakthrough album?' -> City of Evil (2005)

## Note on Drummer Entity

Verify that The Rev (the-rev) exists as a drummer entry in the site's drummer data. If not, the article can still be created as an album article referencing him as the performer, similar to how guest-drummer articles work. His driverId would need to be 'the-rev' or similar. Check against the drummer roster before implementation.

## Files to Touch

- packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js — add city-of-evil-drum-setup entry
- public/llms/articles/city-of-evil-drum-setup.md

## Quality Gate

- >= 300 words covering kit, recording context, The Rev's technical approach
- relatedAlbums: ['waking-the-fallen-drum-setup'] (if that article ships) + Nightmare link
- FAQ >= 3 Q&A
- Person schema (The Rev) + MusicAlbum schema
- Internal links >= 3

## Verify

1. Slug city-of-evil-drum-setup in getAlbumArticleSlugs()
2. LLM file at public/llms/articles/city-of-evil-drum-setup.md exists
3. Page loads without 404
4. The Rev entity resolved (driverId verified)
5. Schema validates

## Done

When the article is live and LLM file exists.
title: SEO: Avenged Sevenfold 'City of Evil' drum setup article (The Rev, 2005 — A7X breakthrough album, LLM citation anchor)
